> diff -ur /mnt/usr/home/jeh/ports/sysutils/webmin/Makefile ./Makefile
> --- /mnt/usr/home/jeh/ports/sysutils/webmin/Makefile    Sun Jul 16 09:33:24 2000
> +++ ./Makefile  Thu Oct 26 09:55:28 2000
> @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

>  PORTNAME=      webmin
> -PORTVERSION=   0.80
> +PORTVERSION=   0.82
>  CATEGORIES=    sysutils
>  MASTER_SITES=  http://www.webmin.com/webmin/download/
>
> Only in .: diff.txt
> [110 KB diff omitted]
> >Unformatted:

Please next time gzip/uuencode such insanely large diffs! BTW, as a committer you
can avoid sending PR's and try to contact maintainer directly. If you will not have
any responce within one-two weeks then you could commit your patch by yourself.

-Maxim
